parameters.formDescription: input_mode=form_upload thi upload file/text. input_mode=drive_url thi cung cap full Google Drive URL.

assignments.name: image_prompt_fixed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.image_prompt_fixed || 'Create realistic image for the script chunk.' }}

parameters.batchSize: ={{ (() => { const n = Number($json.image_parallelism ?? 2); if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n < 1) return 2; return Math.min(20, Math.floor(n)); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { request_id: $json.request_id, workflow: $json.workflow, chunk_key: $json.chunk_key, part_name: $json.partName, index: $json.index, order: $json.order, text: $json.text, prompt: $json.image_prompt_fixed, model: $json.image_model, aspect_ratio: $json.image_aspect_ratio, input_mode: $json.input_mode, output_mode: $json.output_mode, drive_file_id: $json.drive_file_id || '', source: 'text-to-images', image_file_name: String($json.image_file_name || ''), file_name: String($json.image_file_name || '') } }}

nodes.name: Write Image Row To Session Sheet (Realtime)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const orderRaw = Number($json.order ?? $json.media_chunks?.order ?? 0); const order = Number.isFinite(orderRaw) && orderRaw > 0 ? Math.floor(orderRaw) : 1; const row = order + 1; const chunk = ($json.media_chunks && typeof $json.media_chunks === 'object' && !Array.isArray($json.media_chunks)) ? $json.media_chunks : $json; const indexRaw = Number(chunk.index ?? $json.index ?? order); const index = Number.isFinite(indexRaw) && indexRaw > 0 ? Math.floor(indexRaw) : order; return { valueInputOption: 'RAW', data: [ { range: 'assets!A' + row + ':F' + row, values: [[ String(order), String(chunk.chunk_key ?? $json.chunk_key ?? ''), String(chunk.partName ?? chunk.part_name ?? $json.partName ?? ''), String(index), String(chunk.text ?? $json.text ?? ''), String($json.image ?? '') ]] }, { range: 'assets!I' + row + ':K' + row, values: [[ String($json.image_status ?? ''), String($json.tts_status ?? ''), String($json.error_reason ?? '') ]] } ] }; })() }}

main.node: Write Image Row To Session Sheet (Realtime)
